channel.title: Skills on The Agency
channel.description: Recent content in Skills on The Agency

item.title: Build your first Claude Code skill
item.description: Helps you freeze a repeated workaround as SKILL.md: specific trigger, runnable procedure, verification, and the failure modes you already paid for.

item.title: Skills encode what you learned the hard way
item.description: Every skill I write holds the constraint I burned time discovering — the CLI flag that silently fails, the join pattern that actually works, the config the docs forgot to mention.
